Paddles

Paddle rankings and finder

Browse popular paddles by brand, type, shape, price band, level fit, traits, and review signals. Verify current price and approval status before buying.

Paddle FinderView tier list

Tier list

Picklary Paddle Tier List

This tier list is not an ad or an absolute ranking. It is an editorial guide inside the Picklary database, combining comparison scores, play-style fit, price band, beginner forgiveness, and benchmark-model signals. Even inside S tier, a power pick, control pick, and value pick mean different things, so use Paddle Finder and the detail pages before deciding.

Find my fit
STop benchmark picks with strong performance, reputation, and broad fit
CRBN 2X Power SeriesAll-court · $229.99Benchmark pick with high fit, performance, and reputation. Strengths: Spin / Power.JOOLA Ben Johns Perseus Pro IVAll-court · $279.95Benchmark pick with high fit, performance, and reputation. Strengths: Spin / Control.JOOLA Collin Johns Scorpeus Pro IVHands-speed · $279.95Benchmark pick with high fit, performance, and reputation. Strengths: Control / Forgiveness.Six Zero Double Black Diamond ControlAll-court · $180.00Benchmark pick with high fit, performance, and reputation. Strengths: Control / Spin.Six Zero RubySpin · $200.00Benchmark pick with high fit, performance, and reputation. Strengths: Spin / Control.Vatic Pro Prism FlashControl · $99.99Benchmark pick with high fit, performance, and reputation. Strengths: Control / Spin.Volair Mach 2 ForzaControl · $119.99Benchmark pick with high fit, performance, and reputation. Strengths: Forgiveness / Control.
AStrong picks for many players when the use case matches
CRBN 1 TruFoam GenesisControl · $279.99Strong recommendation for the right use case. CLimited-fit picks to compare carefully against alternatives
ONIX Evoke PremierPower · $149.99Limited-fit pick. It can work, but compare alternatives before choosing.
DNo current database model is placed in D tier

No current database model is placed in D tier

Quick benchmark picks by purpose

Do not read only S/A/B. Start with the benchmark closest to your on-court problem.

All-courtSix Zero Double Black Diamond Control

A useful reference point for balanced players.

ControlSelkirk LUXX Control Air with InfiniGrit

Compare when resets, drops, and dinks matter most.

PowerCRBN 1X Power Series

Useful for players who drive and speed up often.

ValueVatic Pro Prism Flash

Check when you want control and spin without jumping to premium pricing.

Beginner-friendlyFriday Original Paddle

A lower-pressure starting point for new players.

Methodology

We combine control, power, spin, forgiveness, hand speed, level fit, price band, use case, and review signals. Price and approval status can change, so verify official sources before buying.

Filter paddles

Prices, specs, and approved-equipment status can change. Treat this as a research dashboard and verify official retailer and equipment-list pages before purchase.

LABS Project Boomstik Elongated

$299.99
Selkirk

OMNI Elongated

All-court · elongated · $299.99

ControlSpinReachStability

CRBN

1 TruFoam Genesis

Control · elongated · $279.99

ControlTouchSpinReach

A Gen-4, 100% foam-core paddle with a tennis-like dwell and feel: exceptional on dinks and resets with strong spin, leaning control over raw pop for advanced players.

View details

Other gear guides

Read this page first, then jump to the related gear guide you need.

BallsCompare indoor/outdoor balls, Franklin X-40, Dura Fast 40, Selkirk Pro S1, and club-use balls.ShoesCheck traction, lateral support, width, cushioning, and durability.ApparelPlan for sweat, movement, heat, indoor courts, and tournament waits.AccessoriesDial in feel with grips, lead tape, bands, cleaners, and small extras.

Paddle launch & review updates

New paddle launches, price changes, market reaction, and reviewer-score notes inside the paddle section. Always verify price, legality, and review sources before buying.

View paddle updates
Paddle launches & reviewsJun 19, 2026

New paddle and review source policy

Paddle launch and review notes belong in the Paddles section. Picklary records price, product-page links, reviewer-score source links, and permission notes instead of inventing scores.

paddlesreviewsmarket reaction

Check before acting: Before buying, check product pages, approved-equipment lists, and original review sources.

Verify at source: Picklary reviewer score template
